location.description: Where the error occurred, e.g. 'body.items[3].tags' or 'path.thing-id'

value.description: The value at the given location

$schema.description: A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.

detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the problem.
examples: Property foo is required but is missing.

errors.description: Optional list of individual error details

instance.description: A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence of the problem.

title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the problem type. This value should not change between occurrences of the error.

type.description: A URI reference to human-readable documentation for the error.

get.description: Returns rows from autotest_results.RunResults for the given slip correlation ID, optionally filtered by environment, stack, stage, or attempt. Defaults to the latest attempt per (Environment, Stack, Stage) tuple.

parameters.description: Filter by Stage / test category, e.g. FeatureCoreApi, PreprodCoreApi, FeatureUI (case-insensitive)
parameters.name: stage

schema.description: Filter by Stage / test category, e.g. FeatureCoreApi, PreprodCoreApi, FeatureUI (case-insensitive)

parameters.description: Specific Attempt to fetch. When omitted, returns the latest attempt per (Environment, Stack, Stage).
parameters.name: attempt

schema.description: Specific Attempt to fetch. When omitted, returns the latest attempt per (Environment, Stack, Stage).

get.summary: Get automation test-suite run results by correlation ID

get.description: Returns rows from autotest_results.TestResultsCor whose CorrelationId matches the given slip correlation ID. Bounded to a 14-day lookback for partition pruning. Filterable by environment, stack, stage, attempt, and status. Defaults to ResultStatus='Failed'; pass `status=*` or `status=all` to widen.

parameters.description: ResultStatus filter (case-insensitive ILIKE). Defaults to 'Failed'; pass '*' or 'all' to disable the filter and return every status.
parameters.name: status

schema.description: ResultStatus filter (case-insensitive ILIKE). Defaults to 'Failed'; pass '*' or 'all' to disable the filter and return every status.

parameters.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response
parameters.name: cursor

schema.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response

get.summary: List individual test results for a slip's runs

get.description: Returns the single TestResultsCor row matching the given (CorrelationId, TestId) pair. Bounded to a 14-day lookback. 404 when no matching test exists.

parameters.description: Test row ID (UUID) from a /tests response
parameters.name: testId

schema.description: Test row ID (UUID) from a /tests response

get.summary: Get a single test result (with stack trace) by TestId

get.description: Returns paginated CI job logs from observability.ciJob, filterable by any column. Use the next_page URL from the response to fetch subsequent pages.

parameters.description: Correlation ID to look up logs for
parameters.name: correlationID

schema.description: Correlation ID to look up logs for

get.summary: Query CI job logs by correlation ID

post.summary: Create a new routing slip for a push event

get.summary: Get a routing slip by repository and commit SHA

post.summary: Find all matching routing slips for a list of commits
Find the first matching routing slip for a list of commits

get.summary: Get a routing slip by correlation ID

put.summary: Record the built container image tag for a component

get.description: Looks up the slip by correlation ID, determines build_scope from ci.repoproperties, and returns per-component image tags. For build_scope=all, all components share the slip-computed tag (YY.WW.SHA7). For build_scope=modified, each component carries its actual tag from ci.buildinfo.
get.summary: Resolve per-component image tags for a routing slip
Check whether all prerequisites for a pipeline step are satisfied

post.summary: Mark a pipeline step as completed
Mark a pipeline step as failed
Mark a pipeline step as skipped
Mark a pipeline step as running
